name: Guest Engine
description: Guest placement, content production, and authority profile platform. Book live show appearances, receive produced content, and build permanent indexed profiles. Part of the MITL Live Network, powered by ConversationOS. Created by Keith Bilous.

guest_booking.description: Book guest appearances on live shows across the MITL Live Network. Three tiers: Single Appearance ($497 one-time), Member ($97/mo for intelligence and visibility), VIP ($297/mo for everything including quarterly appearances).

guest_directory.description: Browse 237+ guest profiles with Signal scores, expertise tags, and authority rankings. Filterable by category, expertise, and score.

character_marketplace.description: Browse AI digital twin characters built from guest appearances and intelligence research.

network_shows.description: Four live shows across the MITL Live Network: Mornings in the Lab (flagship), It Starts with Joy LIVE, The Jason Hewlett Show, Kindness Rising. Multiple segment formats including Center Stage, Deep Dive, Community Corner, No Safe Words, BS or No BS, Did You Know.

signal_intelligence.description: Signal ENGINE researches 30 days of community discourse around each guest. Free Signal Report available for prospective guests to see what AI knows about their world.

content_production.description: Full post-appearance content production: 5 vertical video clips, 10 social media posts, full transcript, highlight reel, permanent authority profile page.

ai_producer.description: Sophia AI producer handles pre-show prep, topic angles, talking points, green room briefing, and guest coordination.

single_appearance.includes: 1 produced live appearance, permanent authority profile, 5 vertical video clips, 10 social media posts, full transcript, highlight reel

member.includes: Monthly Signal intelligence report, AI digital twin character, network discovery and matching, member directory listing, community access

vip.includes: Everything in Member plus quarterly produced appearances, weekly intelligence reports, Center Stage and Deep Dive access, priority placement, premium authority profile

authors.description: Guest appearances and content production for authors, speakers, and thought leaders

coaches.description: Guest appearances and content production for life coaches, fitness coaches, and mentors

founders.description: Guest appearances and content production for startup founders and entrepreneurs

realestate.description: Guest appearances and content production for real estate agents, brokers, and property professionals

podcasters.description: Guest appearances and cross-promotion for podcast hosts and show creators

consultants.description: Guest appearances and content production for consultants and fractional executives

therapists.description: Guest appearances for therapists, psychologists, and counselors

financial_advisors.description: Guest appearances for financial advisors, CFPs, and wealth managers

attorneys.description: Guest appearances for attorneys and legal professionals

health_wellness.description: Guest appearances for health and wellness professionals

nonprofit_leaders.description: Guest appearances for nonprofit leaders and social impact executives

corporate_executives.description: Guest appearances for C-suite executives and corporate leaders

authentication.notes: Guest profiles and directory are publicly browsable. Booking requires account creation at ge.conversationos.live.
